name: Sea Ltd. Reg.Shs Cl.A(ADRs)/1 D
summary: Sea Ltd. is a global consumer internet company that operates three core businesses across digital entertainment, e-commerce, and digital financial services, known as Garena, Shopee, and SeaMoney, respectively. Garena develops and publishes mobile and PC online games; Shopee is an e-commerce platform in Southeast Asia and Taiwan; and SeaMoney provides digital payment and financial services. The company is headquartered in Singapore.
